title: Bountiful Bites
body:
# [W.I.P] Bountiful Bites
### An all-in-one food mod by startFX

Have you ever wanted to make almost any food in Minecraft ? Well, **that is Bountiful Bites' promise**. **Have fun crafting and eating foods !**

*Note : with each beta update, this mod will grow in size. I will keep adding new stuff to the mod until it is finished.*

This mod is very much a **Work-In-Progress**, please remember that when playing it.

## Credits
**MCreator** - For allowing me to make this Minecraft mod.

**Modrinth** - For allowing me to publish this Minecraft mod.

## Issue Tracker
